_doc: Portable default permissions allowlist for the background jot claude worker. jot.sh reads this file on every /jot invocation, expands ${HOME} template placeholders, and injects the result into the per-invocation settings.json. Patterns for files under the user's project directory are RELATIVE to the worker's cwd — Claude Code passes relative paths to Read/Write/Edit and the permission matcher compares literal strings, so absolute patterns like Write(/abs/path/Todos/**) do NOT match a tool arg of Write(Todos/foo.md). The installed copy lives at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/permissions.local.json — edit that file to add or remove permissions for your environment; changes take effect on the next /jot. Do NOT edit this bundled default — it will be overwritten on plugin upgrade.
